prompt:
In Mail, compose a NEW draft — do NOT send. Subject: 'KinBench 141'. Apply any configured Mail signature to the draft (Mail menu > Settings > Signatures shows the names; or in the compose window the signature dropdown at the top). If no signature exists, write a body that contains the literal text '-- 
KinBench Signature' (the standard signature delimiter) as a manual fallback. Fast path: `cerebellum 'mail draft "KinBench 141" "body
-- 
KinBench Signature"'`.
